'''''Shannador's Revenge''''' was an [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser]] in the [[Picket Fleet/Legends|CSA Picket Fleet]] used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to defend [[Orron III]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
